name: bitwise_ops
description: Perform bitwise AND, OR, XOR, left-shift and right-shift on two integers.
python_reference:
def bitwise_ops(a: int, b: int) -> tuple:
    return (a & b, a | b, a ^ b, a << b, a >> b)
mojo_reference:
fn bitwise_ops(a: Int, b: Int) -> Tuple[Int, Int, Int, Int, Int]:
    return (a & b, a | b, a ^ b, a << b, a >> b)
